title: Simple Chat Indicator
description: Can't tell if a friend is typing in chat, or just AFK? Then this is for you!
body:
Have you ever wondered if that friend of yours is AFK, or just typing out a really long message? If so, then this project is for you! **_Simple Chat Indicator_** just puts a little indicator above a players model while their chat is open, allowing you to see if you're wasteing your time tring to get their attention.

See below for a glance at the default config settings... 

![Default setting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94a82b2cc211eb9883eca2ae697dabb97837d148.png)

**_Simple Chat Indicator_** is required on both the server and client sides.
